scenarios.description: children() on element with no child nodes returns empty list (childNodeSize()==0 short-circuit)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children

scenarios.description: children() filters out non-Element nodes: mixed TextNode and Element yields only Element
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); el.appendChild(new Element("span"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains exactly one child: the <span> element

scenarios.description: children() with multiple Element children returns all in order (loop N>1)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("ul"); el.appendChild(new Element("li")); el.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains two <li> children in insertion order

scenarios.description: children() respects shadowChildrenRef cache: after first call and then mutation, cache is invalidated and rebuilt
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new Element("p")); // initial child; second call after mutation
scenarios.expectedResult:
first children() returns one

; after el.appendChild(new Element("span")), children() returns two in order

,
